About Story Now Projects Journal CV
Thomas Nyarko Hayford

Business growth partner with hands-on experience in relationships, sales, and operations.

I currently work as a Relationship Manager at Hubtel and I also founded Iderwell. My background spans merchant growth, operational support, software testing, and people coordination.

Read my story · Visit Iderwell

Founder of Iderwell · Business growth partner

Life Behind The Work

A simple personal visual layer to balance business achievements with real moments.

Hubtel Since 2023 Moved from Retailer Relationship Executive to Relationship Manager in March 2025.
20% -> 8% Retailer cancellation reduction achieved through proactive daily support and readiness controls.
Cross-Functional Experience in relationship management, operations, software testing, and HR support.
St. John's to UCC General Arts at St. John's School - Sekondi (2009-2013), then University of Cape Coast from 2014.

How I Help

Relationship Growth

Build strong merchant partnerships

Consistent communication, account support, and practical follow-through.

Sales Support

Improve product adoption

Helping businesses move from basic channels into stronger digital payment flows.

Operations Discipline

Turn feedback into action

Clear issue escalation, daily support rhythm, and measurable service improvements.
